name: Planon IWMS & Facilities Management API
what_it_does: Planon REST API for integrated workplace management system (IWMS) and facilities management platform. Enables AI agents to manage work order creation, maintenance scheduling, and asset lifecycle tracking for facilities operations, handle real estate portfolio and lease management data retrieval for property lifecycle management, access space allocation and occupancy tracking data for workplace optimization, retrieve energy and sustainability performance data for ESG and net-zero reporting, manage visitor management and access control integration data for workplace security, handle move management and space planning workflow data for real estate portfolio optimization, access maintenance and inspection compliance tracking for facilities regulatory management, retrieve contractor and vendor management data for facilities service procurement, manage capital project planning and building improvement data, and integrate facilities data with ERP, BIM, IoT sensor, and HR systems.
use_cases: Automating work orders from facilities management agents
Tracking space utilization from workplace optimization agents
Managing lease portfolios from real estate analytics agents
Monitoring energy consumption from sustainability reporting agents
not_for: Residential property management without enterprise IWMS needs
Small organizations without enterprise facilities management complexity
Simple work order apps without integrated real estate and space management
best_when: A large enterprise, healthcare organization, university, or government agency using Planon wants AI agents to automate facilities maintenance, space optimization, lease management, energy monitoring, and regulatory compliance across a complex real estate portfolio.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Planon lease data supports IFRS 16/ASC 842 accounting compliance — automated lease modifications without accounting team review creates financial reporting errors. Facilities compliance data for regulated industries (healthcare Joint Commission, nuclear NRC) requires review before automated changes. Visitor management and access control integration involves physical security — automated access decisions require security team validation.

auth.notes: Planon uses OAuth 2.0 authentication. Per-tenant credentials. Webhooks for facilities and maintenance events. REST API with JSON. Nijmegen, Netherlands HQ (global). Private company. 2,500+ enterprise customers. Strong in healthcare, higher education, and corporate real estate. European heritage with strong US presence. Planon Universe is the product suite (Planon Real Estate Management, Planon Facility Management, Planon Workplace Management). Competes with IBM Maximo, Accruent FAMIS, and Archibus for enterprise IWMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by module, user count, and managed square footage
pricing.notes: Nijmegen, Netherlands. Founded 1982. Private. 2,500+ customers across 40 countries. Planon Universe product suite covers real estate, facilities, and workplace management. Strong in European enterprise market and US healthcare/higher education. ISO 27001 certified. Competes with IBM Maximo, Accruent, and Archibus for global IWMS market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per deployment

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Planon lease data underpins IFRS 16/ASC 842 financial reporting; automated lease record changes without accounting sign-off creates financial statement compliance risk
Planon Universe modular structure — real estate, facilities, and workplace management modules have separate data models; understand module structure before API integration
European vs. US deployment differences — Planon has European heritage; some European-centric regulatory features (GDPR data subjects) may differ from US deployment configurations
Healthcare facilities compliance — Planon in hospital facilities management includes Joint Commission compliance data; automated facilities changes require infection control and compliance review
IoT integration complexity — Planon IoT integration (sensors, BMS) requires additional connector licensing and network configuration; verify IoT data flow architecture
Space management data model — space management in Planon is hierarchical (campus, building, floor, space); automated space allocation must maintain hierarchy integrity
agent_readiness.security_notes: IWMS and facilities management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Real estate lease, space, and maintenance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: IWMS facilities management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Real estate and facility data.
